transcript: Uh, look. You're not gonna bring anything here. You understand what I'm sayin'?
Do you... do you catch my drift?
Now, fuck the bullshit, do you catch my drift? Okay?
I'd like to talk to you like a goddamn man. You don't wanna talk to one, you've got the address and the phone number and the goddamn location. I'll be here waiting. Bring it on.
